summary: Iteration 58: Phase 4 Groups Module Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All Phase 4 features verified working after fixing GroupDetail.jsx members endpoint bug.

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts render with -1 dimensions initially (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning, doesn't affect functionality)

group_events.GET /api/admin/groups/{groupId}/events: PASS - Returns events with RSVP counts

admin_groups_page.groups_tab: PASS - Groups tab visible and functional
admin_groups_page.join_requests_tab: PASS - Join Requests tab visible with empty state
admin_groups_page.create_group_modal: PASS - Has enrollment_type and category fields
admin_groups_page.edit_group_modal: PASS - Has enrollment_type and category fields
admin_groups_page.group_cards: PASS - Display correctly with action buttons

group_detail_page.events_tab: PASS - Events tab visible with New Event button
group_detail_page.create_event_dialog: PASS - Opens with title, description, date, time, location fields
group_detail_page.resources_tab: PASS - Resources tab visible with Add Resource button
group_detail_page.add_resource_dialog: PASS - Opens with title, description, type, URL fields
group_detail_page.chat_tab: PASS - Chat tab visible with message input and send button
group_detail_page.existing_data: PASS - Shows existing events and messages

bugs_fixed.issue: members.map is not a function - GroupDetail page crashed when loading
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Frontend was calling /api/groups/{groupId}/members which returns 404, causing membersData to be an error object instead of array
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed endpoint to /api/groups/{groupId}/members/list and added defensive check to ensure members is always an array

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 4 endpoints properly implement tenant isolation via tenant_id
Group events include RSVP counts aggregation
Group chat is HTTP-based (polling) not WebSocket - appropriate for scaffolding
Enrollment types (open/request_to_join/closed) properly stored and displayed
seed_data_creation: Test data created with 'TEST_' prefix for events, resources, messages (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified Phase 4 Groups Module: enrollment workflows (open/closed/request_to_join), join request approval system, group events with RSVP, resources/file sharing, and group chat scaffolding. Fixed GroupDetail.jsx members endpoint bug. All backend endpoints working (18/18 tests). All frontend UI elements present and functional. Note: Welcome modal appears on first login - dismiss by clicking 'I'll figure it out myself' link. MOCKED: SolomonPay payment processing (UI scaffold only).

mocked_apis_list: SolomonPay payment processing - UI scaffold only

ui_tests_passed: Admin Groups page loads with Groups and Join Requests tabs
Create Group modal has enrollment_type and category fields
Edit Group modal has enrollment_type and category fields
Events tab visible with New Event button
Create Event dialog opens with all fields
Resources tab visible with Add Resource button
Add Resource dialog opens with all fields
Chat tab visible with message input and send button
